Measurement: Calculated as: Total quantity available in Maven & dispatched/Total quantity ordered
GRN throughput is subject to a cut-off of 11:00am
Outbound throughput is subject to a cut-off of 2:00pm
Returns throughput is subject to a cut-off of 10:00am
Total affected quantity (Short reported, excess reported and mismatch reported)/ Total quantity ordered during the month
Measured at the time of full audit carried out against Maven inventory by Client or any third party appointed by the Client

Final Shrinkage value calculated at Client’s holding cost of the inventory (net of any excess inventory found) Net value of transacted goods (excess – shortage) during the audit period measured at holding cost
Target: 1 Annual Audit is included in the commercials
2x of the service fee per affected qty
10% of monthly billing; not applicable if there are outstanding payments; no cap on shrinkage
